description: Style NoteThis season's french connection line has a wide variety of stylish wallets for the cosmopoliton male. So enhance up your style with this fashionable, and spacious wallet from French Connection. It's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently and it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit.Product DetailsBlack two-fold wallet Has a main compartment, eight card slots and two insert pocketsBrand embroidered on the frontMaterial and CareOuter: 100% leather, inner: 100% polyurethane and lining: 80% cotton and 20% polyesterWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
